title: Proclamation No. 583, s. 1940
text:
MALACAÑAN PALACE MANILA

PROCLAMATION NO. 583

ESTABLISHING AS KITCHARAO FOREST RESERVE FOR FOREST PROTECTION AND TIMBER PRODUCTION, A PARCEL OF THE PUBLIC DOMAIN SITUATED IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF JABONGA, PROVINCE OF AGUSAN, ISLAND OF MINDANAO.

Upon recommendation of the Director of Forestry, approved by the Secretary of Agriculture and Commerce, and pursuant to the provisions of section eighteen hundred and twenty-six of Act Numbered Twenty-seven hundred and eleven, known as the Revised Administrative Code, I, Manuel L. Quezon, President of the Philippines, hereby establish for forest protection and timber production the Kitcharao Forest Reserve and place it under the administration and control of the Bureau of Forestry, which shall have the authority to regulate the use and occupancy of this reserve and the cutting, collection and removal of timber and other forest products therein in accordance with the Forest Law and Regulations.

I, therefore, withdraw from entry, sale or settlement and hereby declare and proclaim to be the Kitcharao Forest Reserve, subject to private rights, if any there be, that portion of the public domain situated in the municipality of Jabonga, Province of Agusan, Island of Mindanao, described on Bureau of Forestry Map No. F. R.-105, to wit:

Beginning at corner 1, a putat tree, 40 cm. in diam., marked L. C. 542/13, identical to corner 1, Cn. F. parcel V of Jabonga, Agusan, which is N. 28° W., about 1.000 meters from barrio San Roque, Jabonga, Agusan; thence following the seacoast in a general north northwesterly direction, about 2,200 meters to corner 2, a bagasa tree, 45 cm. in diam., marked F. Z. 297/92. identical to corner 2, Cn. F. parcel V of Jabonga, Agusan; thence N. 50° E., 425 meters to corner 3, a labunao tree. 70 cm. in diam., marked F. Z. 297/88, identical to corner 3. Cn. Corners 1, 98 to 120 and 122 to 137 were marked with official marking hatchet No. B. F. 471; corners 2 to 7, 15 to 25 and 121 with B. F. 210; corners 26 to 53, with B. F. 790; and corners 54 to 97 with B. F. 852.

Containing an approximate area of 2,828 hectares.

In witness whereof, I have hereunto set my hand and caused the seal of the Commonwealth of the Philippines to be affixed.

Done at the City of Manila, this eighth day of July, in the year of Our Lord, nineteen hundred and forty, and of the Commonwealth of the Philippines, the fifth.

MANUEL L. QUEZON President of the Philippines

By the President: JORGE B. VARGAS Secretary to the President

Source: Presidential Museum and Library
